FROM catalog.products

FROM billing.payments
WHERE billing.payments.amount_refunded > 0

SELECT AVG(grand_total) AS average_grand_total
FROM sales.orders

FROM support.tickets
WHERE priority = 'urgent'
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM sales.orders

FROM billing.payments
WHERE billing.payments.status = 'captured'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS archived_product_count
FROM catalog.products
WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS european_country_count
FROM geo.countries
WHERE continent = 'Europe'

FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count IS NOT NULL
SELECT 'insufficient schema: missing sign-up information' AS error

SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_tickets_count
FROM support.tickets
WHERE status != 'closed'

FROM billing.invoices
WHERE status = 'overdue'

results.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  catalog.products.id AS product_id,
  catalog.products.name AS product_name,
  catalog.brands.name AS brand_name
FROM 
  catalog.products
LEFT JOIN 
  catalog.brands ON catalog.products.brand_id = catalog.brands.id

SELECT 
    catalog.product_reviews.id AS review_id,
    catalog.product_reviews.title AS review_title,
    catalog.product_reviews.body AS review_body,
    catalog.products.name AS product_name
FROM 
    catalog.product_reviews
JOIN 
    catalog.products ON catalog.product_reviews.product_id = catalog.products.id

SELECT 
  billing.subscriptions.id AS subscription_id,
  billing.plans.name AS plan_name
FROM 
  billing.subscriptions
JOIN 
  billing.plans ON billing.subscriptions.plan_id = billing.plans.id

SELECT 
  orders.id AS order_id,
  orders.order_number,
  orders.public_id AS order_public_id,
  orders.placed_at,
  users.email AS user_email
FROM 
  sales.orders
JOIN 
  identity.users ON orders.user_id = users.id

SELECT catalog.products.id, catalog.products.name
FROM catalog.products
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews ON catalog.products.id = catalog.product_reviews.product_id
WHERE catalog.product_reviews.id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT subscriptions.user_id) AS active_subscribers
FROM billing.subscriptions
JOIN billing.plans ON subscriptions.plan_id = plans.id
WHERE subscriptions.status = 'active' AND plans.name = 'pro'

SELECT
  o.currency_code,
  SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM
  sales.orders o
GROUP BY
  o.currency_code

SELECT
    o.tenant_id,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM
    sales.orders o
GROUP BY
    o.tenant_id

SELECT p.id, p.name, AVG(pr.rating) AS average_rating
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING AVG(pr.rating) > 4

SELECT u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM identity.users u
JOIN sales.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3

SELECT
    countries.name AS country_name,
    SUM(orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM
    sales.orders
JOIN
    geo.addresses ON orders.shipping_address_id = addresses.id
JOIN
    geo.countries ON addresses.country_id = countries.id
GROUP BY
    countries.name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM sales.order_items oi
JOIN catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
JOIN catalog.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT identity.users.email
FROM billing.payment_refunds
JOIN identity.users ON billing.payment_refunds.tenant_id = identity.users.tenant_id
WHERE billing.payment_refunds.status IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS user_count
FROM geo.addresses a
JOIN geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Germany' AND a.user_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT
    p.code AS plan_code,
    COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN
    billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE
    s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY
    p.code

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM
  sales.orders
WHERE
  placed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY
  month
ORDER BY
  month

SELECT
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_order_revenue
FROM
    identity.tenants t
JOIN
    sales.orders o ON t.id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY
    t.id, t.name
ORDER BY
    total_order_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT c.name, COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM catalog.categories c
JOIN catalog.product_categories pc ON c.id = pc.category_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(o.grand_total), 0) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM 
    sales.orders o
WHERE 
    o.currency_code = 'EUR'
    AND o.placed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS cancelled_fraction
FROM 
    sales.orders

SELECT id, name, legal_name, domain, industry, employee_count, annual_revenue, currency_code, owner_user_id, phone, website, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT 
    bp.name AS plan_name,
    AVG(o.grand_total) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    billing.plans bp ON s.plan_id = bp.id
JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON s.user_id = o.user_id AND s.tenant_id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    bp.name

SELECT 
    invoices.status, 
    COUNT(invoices.id) AS paid_invoices_count
FROM 
    billing.invoices
WHERE 
    invoices.paid_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    invoices.status

SELECT COUNT(*) AS bounced_sessions_count
FROM analytics.web_sessions
WHERE is_bounce = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_coupons_count
FROM pricing.coupons
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(billing.payment_refunds.amount), 0) AS total_successful_refunds
FROM billing.payment_refunds
WHERE billing.payment_refunds.status = 'successful'
results.error: invalid input value for enum refund_status: "successful"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS deletion_count
FROM audit.audit_log
WHERE action = 'deletion'
results.error: invalid input value for enum audit_action: "deletion"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT AVG(score) AS average_csat_score
FROM support.csat_responses

SELECT COUNT(*) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_won = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS churned_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'churned'
results.error: invalid input value for enum subscription_status: "churned"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS marketing_blasts_count
FROM marketing.campaign_messages
WHERE sent_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS goods_out_movements_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements
WHERE kind = 'goods-out'
results.error: invalid input value for enum movement_kind: "goods-out"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS converted_leads_count
FROM crm.leads
WHERE converted_account_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_webhook_callbacks
FROM comms.webhook_deliveries
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT
  status,
  COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM
  comms.notifications
GROUP BY
  status

SELECT action, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM audit.audit_log
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY action

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM
  analytics.events
GROUP BY
  month
ORDER BY
  month

SELECT job_runs.status, COUNT(*) AS failed_count
FROM ops.job_runs
WHERE job_runs.status = 'failed'
GROUP BY job_runs.status

SELECT 
    (COUNT(cm.bounced_at) * 1.0 / COUNT(cm.id)) AS bounce_fraction
FROM 
    marketing.campaign_messages cm
WHERE 
    cm.bounced_at IS NOT NULL OR cm.bounced_at IS NULL

SELECT 
    i.currency_code, 
    SUM(i.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
    billing.invoices i
GROUP BY 
    i.currency_code

SELECT 
    tenant_id, 
    COUNT(*) AS open_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.opportunities
WHERE 
    is_closed = FALSE
GROUP BY 
    tenant_id

SELECT 
  comms.notifications.id AS notification_id,
  identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
  comms.notifications
JOIN 
  identity.users ON comms.notifications.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT 
  opportunities.id,
  opportunities.name AS opportunity_name,
  pipelines.name AS pipeline_name
FROM 
  crm.opportunities
JOIN 
  crm.pipelines ON opportunities.pipeline_id = pipelines.id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS refund_count
FROM billing.payment_refunds AS pr
JOIN billing.payments AS p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
WHERE p.status = 'captured'

SELECT p_coupons.id, p_coupons.code
FROM pricing.coupons AS p_coupons
LEFT JOIN pricing.coupon_redemptions AS p_redemptions
ON p_coupons.id = p_redemptions.coupon_id
WHERE p_redemptions.id IS NULL

SELECT
  c.code,
  SUM(cr.discount_amount) AS total_redeemed_discount
FROM
  pricing.coupon_redemptions cr
JOIN
  pricing.coupons c ON cr.coupon_id = c.id
GROUP BY
  c.code

SELECT
  sa.id AS agent_id,
  AVG(cr.score) AS average_score
FROM
  support.support_agents sa
JOIN
  support.csat_responses cr ON sa.id = cr.rated_agent_id
GROUP BY
  sa.id
HAVING
  AVG(cr.score) < 3

SELECT 
    c.name AS campaign_name, 
    COUNT(cm.id) AS message_count
FROM 
    marketing.campaign_messages cm
JOIN 
    marketing.campaigns c ON cm.campaign_id = c.id
GROUP BY 
    c.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(cm.id) > 100

SELECT 
    p.id AS pipeline_id,
    p.name AS pipeline_name,
    COUNT(o.id) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.pipelines p
LEFT JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON p.id = o.pipeline_id AND o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    won_opportunities_count DESC

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', le.occurred_at) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN le.direction = 'debit' THEN le.amount ELSE -le.amount END) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', le.occurred_at)) AS running_net_debit_total
FROM
    billing.ledger_entries le
GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('month', le.occurred_at)
ORDER BY
    month
results.error: column "le.direction" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function

results.pred_sql:
SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    sa.display_name, 
    AVG(cr.score) AS average_csat_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses cr
JOIN 
    support.support_agents sa ON cr.rated_agent_id = sa.id
GROUP BY 
    sa.display_name

SELECT
    w.name AS warehouse_name,
    COUNT(sm.id) AS stock_movement_count
FROM
    inventory.stock_movements sm
JOIN
    inventory.stock_locations sl ON sm.stock_location_id = sl.id
JOIN
    inventory.warehouses w ON sl.warehouse_id = w.id
GROUP BY
    w.name

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM identity.users u
JOIN marketing.campaign_messages cm ON u.id = cm.user_id
LEFT JOIN sales.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE cm.opened_at IS NOT NULL
  AND o.id IS NULL

SELECT
    bp.code AS plan_code,
    SUM(i.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM
    billing.invoices i
JOIN
    billing.subscriptions s ON i.subscription_id = s.id
JOIN
    billing.plans bp ON s.plan_id = bp.id
WHERE
    i.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY
    bp.code

SELECT
    geo.countries.name AS country_name,
    SUM(billing.payments.amount_refunded) AS total_refunded_amount
FROM
    billing.payments
JOIN
    sales.orders ON billing.payments.order_id = sales.orders.id
JOIN
    geo.addresses ON sales.orders.shipping_address_id = geo.addresses.id
JOIN
    geo.countries ON geo.addresses.country_id = geo.countries.id
GROUP BY
    geo.countries.name

SELECT COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM comms.notifications n
JOIN identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
WHERE n.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT DISTINCT identity.users.email
FROM billing.subscriptions
JOIN billing.plans ON subscriptions.plan_id = plans.id
JOIN support.tickets ON subscriptions.user_id = tickets.requester_user_id
JOIN identity.users ON subscriptions.user_id = identity.users.id
WHERE subscriptions.status = 'active'
  AND plans.name = 'enterprise'
  AND tickets.id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandoned_baskets_count
FROM sales.carts
WHERE status = 'abandoned'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS delivered_fulfillments_count
FROM sales.fulfillments
WHERE delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_product_variants_count
FROM catalog.product_variants
WHERE is_active = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT po.id) AS fully_received_purchase_orders
FROM inventory.purchase_orders po
JOIN inventory.purchase_order_lines pol ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
WHERE pol.quantity_ordered = pol.quantity_received
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM inventory.purchase_order_lines pol2
  WHERE pol2.purchase_order_id = po.id
  AND pol2.quantity_ordered <> pol2.quantity_received
)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejected_sign_in_attempts
FROM identity.login_attempts
WHERE succeeded = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS greenlit_returns_count
FROM sales.returns
WHERE status = 'approved'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_transactional_emails
FROM marketing.campaign_messages
WHERE status = 'failed' AND campaign_id IS NULL

SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) AS average_page_view_duration
FROM analytics.page_views

SELECT 
    p.gateway, 
    SUM(p.amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM 
    billing.payments p
WHERE 
    p.status = 'captured'
GROUP BY 
    p.gateway

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM occurred_at) AS hour_of_day, 
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
  analytics.events
GROUP BY 
  hour_of_day
ORDER BY 
  event_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  (SUM(CASE WHEN email_log.status = 'sent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS success_fraction
FROM 
  comms.email_log
results.error: invalid input value for enum delivery_status: "sent"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT
  tm.ticket_id,
  COUNT(tm.id) AS message_count
FROM
  support.ticket_messages tm
GROUP BY
  tm.ticket_id
HAVING
  COUNT(tm.id) >= 8

SELECT 
    order_id, 
    SUM(line_total) AS total_line_value
FROM 
    sales.order_items
GROUP BY 
    order_id
ORDER BY 
    total_line_value DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    shipments.tracking_number, 
    orders.order_number
FROM 
    sales.shipments
JOIN 
    sales.fulfillments ON shipments.fulfillment_id = fulfillments.id
JOIN 
    sales.orders ON fulfillments.order_id = orders.id
WHERE 
    shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  crm.contacts.first_name,
  crm.contacts.last_name,
  crm.accounts.name AS account_name
FROM 
  crm.contacts
LEFT JOIN 
  crm.accounts ON crm.contacts.account_id = crm.accounts.id

SELECT pm.kind, COUNT(p.id) AS captured_payments_count
FROM billing.payments p
JOIN billing.payment_methods pm ON p.payment_method_id = pm.id
WHERE p.status = 'captured'
GROUP BY pm.kind

SELECT
    b.name AS brand_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM
    sales.order_items oi
JOIN
    catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
JOIN
    catalog.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id
JOIN
    catalog.brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id
GROUP BY
    b.name

SELECT 
    w.name AS warehouse_name, 
    COUNT(f.id) AS fulfillment_count
FROM 
    sales.fulfillments f
JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses w ON f.warehouse_id = w.id
WHERE 
    f.status IN ('shipped', 'delivered')
GROUP BY 
    w.name
ORDER BY 
    fulfillment_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
    o.currency_code,
    SUM(pr.amount) AS total_succeeded_refund_amount
FROM
    billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN
    billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
JOIN
    sales.orders o ON p.order_id = o.id
WHERE
    pr.status = 'succeeded'
GROUP BY
    o.currency_code

SELECT
  o.user_id,
  o.placed_at,
  o.grand_total,
  SUM(o.grand_total) OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY o.placed_at) AS running_total
FROM
  sales.orders o
WHERE
  o.placed_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  o.user_id,
  o.placed_at
LIMIT 50

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
    COUNT(o.id) - LAG(COUNT(o.id)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at)) AS change_from_previous_month
FROM
    sales.orders o
GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at)
ORDER BY
    month

SELECT 
    o.owner_user_id, 
    COUNT(d.id) AS won_deals_count
FROM 
    crm.opportunities o
JOIN 
    crm.deals d ON o.id = d.opportunity_id
WHERE 
    o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    o.owner_user_id
ORDER BY 
    won_deals_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS users_without_successful_signin
FROM identity.users u
LEFT JOIN identity.login_attempts la ON u.id = la.user_id AND la.succeeded = TRUE
WHERE la.id IS NULL

SELECT p.name, COUNT(pr.id) AS approved_review_count
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY approved_review_count DESC
LIMIT 10
